scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && conda run -n task-flow uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.dev:migrate: cd backend && conda run -n task-flow alembic upgrade head
scripts.dev:migrate:create: bash -c 'test -n "${MSG}" || (echo "Usage: MSG=\"describe change\" npm run dev:migrate:create" && exit 1); cd backend && conda run -n task-flow alembic revision --autogenerate -m "${MSG}"'
scripts.dev:test: cd backend && conda run -n task-flow pytest -v && cd ../frontend && npm test -- --run
scripts.dev:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up db -d && cd backend && conda run -n task-flow alembic upgrade head
scripts.docker:test: docker compose exec backend pytest -v && docker compose exec frontend npm test -- --run
scripts.docker:migrate: docker compose exec backend alembic upgrade head
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up --build -d
